channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Spain is returning to the World Cup final after defeating France
item.description: Spain is returning to the World Cup final after defeating France 2-0 in the semifinals. Spain has shone in this tournament, allowing just one goal so far. They'll play either Argentina or England.
item.content:encoded: Spain is returning to the World Cup final after defeating France 2-0 in the semifinals. Spain has shone in this tournament, allowing just one goal so far. They'll play either Argentina or England.
item.dc:creator: Steve Futterman

item.title: Israeli court fails to stop demolition of shepherding community in occupied West Bank
item.description: Settlers destroyed a shepherding community in the occupied West Bank despite a suspension order from Israel's highest court. The court has warned of legal anarchy as more of its decisions are flouted.
item.content:encoded: Settlers destroyed a shepherding community in the occupied West Bank despite a suspension order from Israel's highest court. The court has warned of legal anarchy as more of its decisions are flouted.
item.dc:creator: Emily Feng

item.title: Rep. Ro Khanna on being detained by Israeli settlers in the West Bank
item.description: NPR's Ailsa Chang speaks with Rep. Ro Khanna, D-Calif., about his recent trip to the occupied West Bank and temporary detention by Israeli settlers and soldiers.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ailsa Chang speaks with Rep. Ro Khanna, D-Calif., about his recent trip to the occupied West Bank and temporary detention by Israeli settlers and soldiers.
item.dc:creator: Michelle Aslam

item.title: Harry Dean Stanton fans celebrate the character actor with a festival in Kentucky
item.description: Character actor Harry Dean Stanton would be 100 years old this week and fans in his home state of Kentucky still celebrate him each year with a festival.
item.content:encoded: Character actor Harry Dean Stanton would be 100 years old this week and fans in his home state of Kentucky still celebrate him each year with a festival.
item.dc:creator: Derek Operle

item.title: Supreme Court Justices Barrett and Kagan discuss security funding on Capitol Hill
item.description: Justices Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett met with lawmakers on Tuesday for a regular budget hearing.
item.content:encoded: Justices Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett met with lawmakers on Tuesday for a regular budget hearing.
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: Questions continue about ICE shooting in Maine
item.description: Investigations are underway in Southern Maine, one day after a fatal shooting by an ICE agent. The agency says it was seeking a different person. Protests and vigils continue.
item.content:encoded: Investigations are underway in Southern Maine, one day after a fatal shooting by an ICE agent. The agency says it was seeking a different person. Protests and vigils continue.
item.dc:creator: Carol Bousquet

item.title: Trump again shrinks Utah national monuments
item.description: President Trump reduced by 90% the size of two national monuments in Utah that were established by Presidents Clinton and Obama.
item.content:encoded: President Trump reduced by 90% the size of two national monuments in Utah that were established by Presidents Clinton and Obama.
item.dc:creator: David Condos

item.title: Gov. Hochul orders a pause on data centers in New York for up to a year
item.description: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul signed an order pausing construction of large data centers — the first statewide pause in the country.
item.content:encoded: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul signed an order pausing construction of large data centers — the first statewide pause in the country.
item.dc:creator: Samuel King

item.title: TrumpRx website for discounts covers just a fraction of brand-name medicines
item.description: TrumpRx, the administration's discounted drug website, has been online for nearly six months. How useful is it, and how much has it changed what Americans pay for prescriptions?
item.content:encoded: TrumpRx, the administration's discounted drug website, has been online for nearly six months. How useful is it, and how much has it changed what Americans pay for prescriptions?
item.dc:creator: Sydney Lupkin

item.title: VAR at the World Cup: Helpful or hindrance?
item.description: The use of the VAR, video assistant referee, has been controversial at this year's World Cup. FIFA says it makes the game fairer. Fans and teams say it's being abused. Has VAR gone too far?
item.content:encoded: The use of the VAR, video assistant referee, has been controversial at this year's World Cup. FIFA says it makes the game fairer. Fans and teams say it's being abused. Has VAR gone too far?
item.dc:creator: Jasmine Garsd
